creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to iz-rpi03 from comment #3)
Thanks. I think the behaviour shouldn't be conditional on an FDT environment though but on finding the specific node for that device - if I plug my device into a USB port on an FDT device it should still take LED configuration from its onboard EEPROM. (For that matter, it should still take LED config if I plug it into a RPi.)

This might be somewhat theoretical as I suspect most/all cases where if_muge is being used are on the RPi3B+, but we should still get it right.
